boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: REL-YAR-079 states workspace transfer authority remains pending

final_answer: Source records show REL-YAR-079 covers dataset and date but explicitly leaves workspace YAR-RISK-2 transfer authority pending. Policy STD-YAR-079-P requires full match including authority before execution. Boundary remains open; action may not proceed. Escalate for pending authority closure.
